title: Pyrolysis kinetics
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5cusa","text":"The sensitivity of cells in planktonic cultures to phages was tested in 96-well microtiter plates.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: A 1:100 dilution of overnight bacterial culture in LB should be prepared and incubated at 37°C to reach an optical density of 0.5 at 600 nm (OD600).
100 µl aliquots of diluted culture were distributed in microplate wells and 100 µl single or mixed phage suspensions (at MOI 10; 1; 0.1 and 0.01) were added.
Microplates were incubated for a further 24 h and optical density was measured at 600 nm in a plate reader every 870s.
creator: Jiaxin Li
